scripts.build: rollup -c && mkdir -p ../custom_components/property_manager/frontend/images && cp node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css ../custom_components/property_manager/frontend/ && cp node_modules/leaflet/dist/images/* ../custom_components/property_manager/frontend/images/ && cp node_modules/leaflet-draw/dist/leaflet.draw.css ../custom_components/property_manager/frontend/ && cp -r node_modules/leaflet-draw/dist/images/* ../custom_components/property_manager/frontend/images/
